title: Raccoon Removal in West Brighton, Staten Island
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in West Brighton, Staten Island. Licensed experts safely remove raccoons from homes and businesses. Call now for fast, humane removal. $900 – $4,000.
intro: West Brighton residents dealing with raccoons in attics, chimneys, or crawl spaces need professional wildlife removal services they can trust. Our licensed raccoon removal specialists serve the entire West Brighton neighborhood with humane, effective solutions for residential and commercial properties. With competitive pricing ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, we provide comprehensive raccoon exclusion and cleanup services.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving West Brighton and all of Staten Island for years with proven raccoon removal expertise. Our technicians are fully licensed, insured, and trained in humane wildlife control methods, offering same-day emergency service and complete attic restoration when needed.
localContext: West Brighton's mix of single-family homes near Broadway and Forest Avenue, along with older residential properties around the Silver Lake area, provides ideal conditions for raccoon intrusions. The proximity to wooded parks and tree-lined streets means raccoons often seek shelter in attics, garages, and beneath porches throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in West Brighton?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in West Brighton typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on factors like the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of damage, and whether babies are present. A basic single raccoon removal starts around $900, while complex infestations requiring multiple visits, exclusion work, and attic cleanup can reach $4,000.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my West Brighton home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency raccoon removal service in West Brighton for urgent situations. Most raccoon removals can begin within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on whether we're dealing with a mother and babies, and whether exclusion barriers need to be installed.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in West Brighton, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in West Brighton due to the neighborhood's mature trees, proximity to green spaces like Silver Lake Park, and abundance of older homes with accessible entry points. Raccoons are particularly active in spring when mothers seek safe nesting sites for their young, often choosing attics and chimneys in West Brighton homes.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal in West Brighton?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, legally compliant raccoon removal methods in West Brighton. Our approach includes live trapping when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors, and reuniting baby raccoons with mothers when possible. We never use poisons or inhumane practices, and we follow all NYC and New York State wildlife regulations.
